name: James
message: Great work team! Looking forward to seeing you at the jamboree...

name: Sully
message: Time to celebrate this quarter's exceptional earnings with our team and maybe recruit new employees at the jamboree

name: Milly
message: I'm excited to come to the office and meet the team after being remote for so long!

name: Scar
message: I'm looking forward to celebrate everyone's hard work over this past quarter. Great job everyone!
private_message: Can I sleep on the break room couch?

name: Alayna
message: Can’t wait to dress to impress at the jamboree and celebrate our successes! Go team!

name: AIDAN T Allen
message: This company has stolen the best Years of my life. I Was working OT when my daughter was born. Her first word was "Stapler". Here's to 15 more incredible years!

name: Robin
message: Can we record this on our time sheet? Does this count as overtime?

name: Maddie
message: Thrilled to be a part of the recent merger. A raise notwithstanding, is there a chance to touch base on ideas for an upcoming employee pizza party?
